title: Better Create Recipes
description: This mod adds new recipes to Create, and also it changes some.
body:
This mod adds a lot of recipes to Create, and makes the game a little bit easier with some changed recipes. (like Crafting recipe for netherite) With this mod, you can automate almost everything in Create mod. You can recommend recipes on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/Gxa3QqwbJ7) If you ever find an issue, or have an idea for a new recipe, contact with me, and i will fix/i will add. 

What recipes does the mod bring?
Netherite,
Lapis,
Easier Diamond,
Quartz,
and much more! (check the images)

What I have to install too, to make this mod work?
Create for surely. (I recommend the 0.5.1f version)

Have fun!
